# 2025 Issue and PR Plan

## Project Complexity
- simple

## Milestone Strategy
- Use only M1(1-3月); issues集中在项目起步月处理。

## Issue Backlog
| # | Title | Labels | Milestone | Planned |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| #1 | 初始化图服务工程与基础流水线 | type:feature,priority:P2,area:init | M1(1-3月) | 2025-01 |
| #2 | 建立节点边模型与迁移脚本 | type:feature,priority:P2,area:init | M1(1-3月) | 2025-01 |
| #3 | 实现 star 事件采集与入库 | type:feature,priority:P1,area:core | M1(1-3月) | 2025-01 |
| #4 | 实现图查询 API 与过滤能力 | type:feature,priority:P2,area:core | M1(1-3月) | 2025-01 |
| #5 | 实现可视化与社区推荐能力 | type:feature,priority:P2,area:core | M1(1-3月) | 2025-01 |
| #6 | 修复大图渲染卡顿与超时 | type:bug,priority:P1,area:bugfix | M1(1-3月) | 2025-01 |
| #7 | 补齐图查询正确性与性能测试 | type:test,priority:P2,area:test | M1(1-3月) | 2025-01 |
| #8 | 完善架构文档与发布说明 | type:docs,priority:P3,area:deploy | M1(1-3月) | 2025-01 |

## PR Cadence
- PR1 Bootstrap: Closes #1, #2
- PR2 Core Feature Pack: Closes #3, #4, #5
- PR3 Stability Pass: Closes #6, #7
- PR4 Docs & Deploy: Closes #8

## Standard PR Template Fields
- Summary
- Linked Issue
- Test Evidence
- Risk
- Rollback
